name: Plum Delicious Pork Cutlets
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless pork leg cutlets - cut to be 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Brown the cutlets on both sides.
3. Add the jelly, chopped onion, white wine vinegar, soy sauce, and ground ginger to the skillet.
4. Cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes.
